description: Switch from automatic input monitoring to keyboard shortcut trigger for translation - user double-presses Control key to translate focused input field content.

userStories.title: Implement global keyboard shortcut listener service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a keyboard shortcut listener that can detect double-Control key press across all macOS applications.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a KeyboardShortcutService that listens for global keyboard events
Detect double-Control key press (within 300ms interval) as primary trigger
Provide protocol-based interface for shortcut detection
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds
userStories.notes: Created KeyboardShortcutService protocol and GlobalKeyboardShortcutService implementation. The service uses NSEvent.addGlobalMonitorForEvents with flagsChanged event type to detect Control key presses. Double-press detection uses a 300ms tolerance window. Fixed AppEnvironment.swift to use MockInputMonitoringService temporarily since GlobalInputMonitoringService was deleted. Build succeeds.

userStories.title: Implement focused input field text reader
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to read all text from the currently focused input field when shortcut is triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: Use Accessibility API to get focused element from system
Extract full text value from focused input field (not just selection)
Handle cases where focused element has no text value with user-facing error
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Add keyboard shortcut customization UI in settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want to customize the trigger shortcut to fit my personal preference.
acceptanceCriteria: Add keyboard shortcut configuration section in ModelSettingsView
Support common shortcut combinations (Cmd+Shift+T, etc.)
Persist shortcut configuration to UserDefaults
Changes take effect immediately without app restart
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Wire shortcut trigger to translation pipeline in AppState
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to connect the keyboard shortcut event to the existing translation pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: AppState listens to keyboard shortcut events
Shortcut event triggers text extraction from focused field
Extracted text flows through existing translation pipeline
Translation result updates floating window via existing mechanism
Translation executes asynchronously without blocking user input
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Add trigger feedback indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want visual feedback when translation is triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: Show brief indicator when shortcut is detected
Indicator appears in floating window area
Feedback is non-intrusive and fades quickly
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Update permission onboarding for new trigger mechanism
userStories.description: As a first-time user, I need to understand that the app uses keyboard shortcut trigger instead of automatic monitoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Permission onboarding explains shortcut-based trigger
Shows default shortcut (double-Control) to user
Explains that accessibility permission is still needed for reading input fields
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Remove automatic input monitoring code
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to clean up the automatic input monitoring code now that shortcut trigger is the primary mechanism.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove GlobalInputMonitoringService polling logic
Remove debounce mechanism (no longer needed)
Keep accessibility permission check for input field reading
Build succeeds after cleanup
xcodebuild -scheme spark -configuration Debug build succeeds

userStories.title: Update existing tests for new trigger mechanism
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need tests updated to reflect the new shortcut-based trigger.
acceptanceCriteria: Update permission gating tests to work with new flow
Add tests for keyboard shortcut detection
Add tests for input field text extraction
Add tests for shortcut customization
All tests pass
xcodebuild test -scheme spark succeeds
